### SymbolNode

>  SymbolNode (id:str, name:str, kind:str, notebook:str, module:str,
>                  cell_index:int, source:str='', source_hash:str='',
>                  line_count:int=0)

*A symbol in the dependency graph.*

<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />

<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>

<td>id</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>

</tr>
<tr>

<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Symbol name.</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Type: ‘function’, ‘class’, ‘constant’, ‘type’.</td>
</tr>

<td>str</td>
<td></td>

</tr>

<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Target module name.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cell_index</td>
<td>int</td>
<td></td>
<td>Cell index in notebook.</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Source code.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>source_hash</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Hash of normalized source for duplication detection.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>line_count</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>0</td>
<td>Number of lines of code.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

>  NotebookNode (id:str, path:pathlib.Path, module:str,
>                    symbols:List[__main__.SymbolNode]=<factory>)

*A notebook in the dependency graph.*

<td></td>

### Edge

>  Edge (source:str, target:str, kind:str='import', weight:float=1.0,
>            metadata:Dict[str,Any]=<factory>)

*A dependency edge in the graph.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>source</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Source node ID (the supporter/dependency).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>target</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Target node ID (the dependent).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>kind</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>import</td>
<td>Edge type: ‘import’, ‘usage’, ‘duplicate_exact’,
‘duplicate_similar’, ‘duplicate_suspected’.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>weight</td>
<td>float</td>
<td>1.0</td>
<td>Edge weight (1.0 for imports, similarity score for duplicates).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>metadata</td>
<td>Dict</td>
<td><factory></td>
<td>Additional edge metadata.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### DependencyGraph

>                       notebooks:Dict[str,__main__.NotebookNode]=<factory>,
>                       symbols:Dict[str,__main__.SymbolNode]=<factory>,
>                       edges:List[__main__.Edge]=<factory>)

*Complete hierarchical dependency graph.*

### detect_duplicates

>  detect_duplicates (graph:__main__.DependencyGraph,
>                         similarity_threshold:float=0.8)

*Detect potential code duplications in the graph.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>graph</td>
<td>DependencyGraph</td>
<td></td>
<td>The dependency graph to analyze.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>similarity_threshold</td>
<td>float</td>
<td>0.8</td>
<td>Minimum similarity ratio for ‘similar’ duplicates (0-1).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>List</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Duplication edges (exact, similar, suspected).</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Interactive Visualization

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/depgraph.py#L866"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### generate_interactive_graph

>  generate_interactive_graph (project:Optional[str]=None,
>                                  output_path:Optional[str]=None,
>                                  include_duplicates:bool=True,
>                                  similarity_threshold:float=0.8)

*Generate an interactive dependency graph visualization.*

Uses D3 circle packing to show hierarchical structure: - Modules contain
notebooks contain symbols - Click to zoom into any level - Edges show
import dependencies and code duplications

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>output_path</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Output HTML file path. Defaults to project/dep_graph.html.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_duplicates</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>Whether to detect and show code duplications.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>similarity_threshold</td>
<td>float</td>
<td>0.8</td>
<td>Threshold for similar duplicate detection.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with graph stats and output path.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
